// workspace format-on-save guard (2026-: A user-global Markdown formatter was mangling YAML frontmatter in AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md on every save (id: -> ## id:, closing --- removed, list indent collapsed). Workspace-level setting below overrides user-global format-on-save for Markdown + frontmatter-sensitive files so the agent-doc validator stays green. Re-enable per-file with a format command if you need a formatter pass on a non-frontmatter .md file.
